clusters.title: Deadly bird flu discovered in second Australian state
clusters.neutral_headline: Deadly bird flu discovered in second Australian state
bullet_summary: A third confirmed case of the deadly H5 bird flu has been found in a migratory bird on Australia's southern coast
Two birds found on the southern coast of Western Australia near Esperance have been confirmed as infected, but there is no evidence so far of a mass-mortality event

items.standfirst: A third confirmed case of the deadly H5 bird flu has been found in a migratory bird on Australia's southern coast.
items.content: A third confirmed case of the deadly H5 bird flu has been found in a migratory bird on Australia's southern coast.

items.title: Bird flu has arrived in Australia
items.standfirst: After years of waiting, the deadly H5N1 strain of bird flu has finally arrived in Australia. Two birds found on the southern coast of Western Australia near Esperance have been confirmed as infected, but there is no evidence so far of a mass-mortality event. So, what actually is H5N1, and why does it matter?
items.content: After years of waiting, the deadly H5N1 strain of bird flu has finally arrived in Australia. Two birds found on the southern coast of Western Australia near Esperance have been confirmed as infected, but there is no evidence so far of a mass-mortality event. So, what actually is H5N1, and why does it matter?
